Title: Verify search bar is visible and accessible on the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the top right of the page
Expected Result: Search bar is visible at the top right of the page with a magnifying glass icon and placeholder text "Search products"
Actual Result: Search bar is visible and accessible on the shop page with appropriate search controls and placeholder text.

Title: Verify search bar is highlighted when clicked
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Observe the search bar border
Expected Result: Search bar is highlighted with a purple border when clicked indicating it is active
Actual Result: Search bar received visual focus when clicked and was ready for user input.

Title: Verify searching for a valid product name returns the correct product
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type a valid product name
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Search returns the product matching the entered search term.
Actual Result: Search returns the product matching the entered search term.

Title: Verify searching for a product using lowercase letters returns the correct result
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type a valid product name in all lowercase
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Correct product is returned. Search is not case sensitive
Actual Result: Correct product is returned. Search is not case sensitive

Title: Verify searching for a product using uppercase letters returns the correct result
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type a valid product name in all uppercase
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Correct product is returned. Search is not case sensitive
Actual Result: Correct product is returned. Search is not case sensitive

Title: Verify searching for a partial product name returns the correct result
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type a partial product name
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Products matching the partial search term are returned.
Actual Result: Products matching the partial search term are returned.

Title: Verify searching for a keyword that does not match any product shows a no results message
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type a keyword that does not match any product
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Search results page is displayed and indicates that no matching products were found.
Actual Result: Search results page is displayed and indicates that no matching products were found.

Title: Verify submitting an empty search does not return any results
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Leave the search field empty
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: User remains on the shop page with all products displayed
Actual Result: User remains on the shop page with all products displayed

Title: Verify searching for a product using special characters does not break the page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type special characters in the search bar
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Page does not crash. the page handles the input gracefully
Actual Result: Page does not crash. the page handles the input gracefully

Title: Verify searching for a product using numbers does not break the page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Type numbers in the search bar
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Page does not crash. No results message is displayed: No products were found matching your selection.
Actual Result: Page does not crash. No results message is displayed: No products were found matching your selection.

Title: Verify that the sorting dropdown is visible on the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the sorting dropdown at the top left of the product listing
Expected Result: Sorting dropdown is visible and displays default sorting option
Actual Result: Sorting dropdown is visible and displays a default sorting option.

Title: Verify that the sorting dropdown displays all available sorting options
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Observe all available options
Expected Result: Dropdown displays all configured sorting options.
Actual Result: Dropdown displays all configured sorting options.

Title: Verify selecting Sort by price low to high reorders products from lowest to highest price
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Select Sort by price: low to high
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products are reordered from lowest to highest price. The cheapest product appears first
Actual Result: Products are reordered from lowest to highest price. The cheapest product appears first

Title: Verify selecting Sort by price high to low reorders products from highest to lowest price
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Select Sort by price: high to low
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products are reordered from highest to lowest price. The most expensive product appears first
Actual Result: Products are reordered from highest to lowest price. The most expensive product appears first

Title: Verify selecting Sort by latest reorders products by newest first
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Select Sort by latest
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products are reordered with the most recently added product appearing first
Actual Result: Products are reordered with the most recently added product appearing first

Title: Verify selecting Sort by popularity reorders products by popularity
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Select Sort by popularity
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products are reordered based on popularity. No error occurs and the page reloads with updated order
Actual Result: Products are reordered based on popularity. No error occurs and the page reloads with updated order

Title: Verify selecting Sort by average rating reorders products by rating
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the sorting dropdown
2. Select Sort by average rating
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products are reordered based on average rating. No error occurs and the page reloads with updated order
Actual Result: Products are reordered based on average rating. No error occurs and the page reloads with updated order

Title: Verify selecting Default sorting resets the product order back to default
Preconditions: User is on the shop page with a sorting option already applied
Test Steps:
1. Select any sorting option from the dropdown
2. Then select Default sorting
3. Observe the product order
Expected Result: Products return to the original default order
Actual Result: Products return to the original default order
